positive: A majestic forest animal silhouette, specifically a watchful stag with branching antlers, standing at the edge of a deep, misty forest glen. The stag is composed against a clean, gradient background that transitions from deep midnight blue at the top to ethereal sage green at the bottom. Minimalist Japanese ink wash style (Sumi-e) meets contemporary nature illustration. Emphasize crisp, clean outlines and highly detailed fur textures contrasting with the smooth, atmospheric fog. Composition should be perfectly centered with the stag as the main focal point. High contrast, moody, elegant. Vectorized quality, perfect for screen printing or apparel art. Studio quality lighting, no shadows bleeding into the background.
negative: photorealistic, 3D render, fuzzy, blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, messy background, clutter, poor composition
